name: Welcome to Acolyte Living
subject: Welcome to the Family, {{firstName}}!
html:
🎓

Welcome to the Family,
{{firstName}}!

You are now part of 50,000+ students who found their perfect home through Acolyte Living. Let us get you settled!

Explore Properties →

A brilliant shared apartment designed to save money.

Spacious twin rooms and fantastic communal areas.

Elevate your student experience with panoramic views.

Premium living featuring a private concierge.

AU$470/wk View

Located directly across street from university gates.

A vibrant student community near central library.

£385/wk View

Features massive games room & weekly events.

£299/wk View

iQ East Court

Built around outdoor social space with BBQ pits.

£385/wk View

£485/wk

28 Moore Park

AU$455/wk
View All Properties →

Why Students Trust Us

🔒

100% Verified

Every property checked

💰

Price Match

Best price guarantee

🛡️

No Visa, No Pay

Risk-free booking

🎧

24/7 Support

Always here for you

Quick Answers

How quickly can I book? +

Most bookings are completed within 5 minutes. You will receive instant confirmation for verified properties.

What if my visa gets rejected? +

No worries! Our "No Visa, No Pay" policy means you get a full refund if your visa application is rejected.

Can I cancel my booking? +

Yes, flexible cancellation policies are available. Terms vary by property — check the listing details before booking.
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

"Acolyte Living made my move to London so smooth. Found a perfect studio near campus in just 2 days. The 24/7 support team is amazing!"

RP

Rahul Patel

King's College London · Sept 2026

Need Help Finding Your Home?

Our student support team is online 24/7

💬 WhatsApp Us 📞 Call Support

© 2026 Acolyte Living. All rights reserved.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service
